name: Butterfly Nature Insect
desc: A symbol of transformation and beauty. Perfect for content about spring, metamorphosis, and vibrant garden wildlife.

name: Honeybee Pollinator Insect
desc: Represents hard work and ecosystem health. High SEO value for sustainability topics, honey production, and 'save the bees' campaigns.

name: Ladybug Garden Insect
desc: A sign of good luck and natural pest control. Ideal for organic gardening tips, children's education, and cute bug aesthetics.

name: Ant Colony Insect
desc: Symbolizes teamwork and diligence. Great for workplace productivity metaphors, entomology facts, and picnic-themed posts.

name: Cricket Chirping Insect
desc: Often used to represent silence or 'crickets' after a joke. Also relevant for alternative protein sources and summer night sounds.

name: Beetle Shell Insect
desc: Represents the vast diversity of the insect world. Used for biology research, exotic pet keeping, and scarab symbolism.

name: Cockroach Pervasive Insect
desc: Commonly used in discussions about urban pests and survival. High value for pest control services and hygiene awareness.

name: Spider Web Insect
desc: Technically an arachnid, but used universally in insect categories. Essential for Halloween decor, arachnophobia topics, and web design metaphors.

name: Scorpion Desert Insect
desc: Represents danger and the zodiac sign Scorpio. Perfect for desert survival guides and edgy branding.

name: Mosquito Pest Insect
desc: The primary icon for summer nuisances and global health. Used for travel safety tips and disease prevention content.

name: Caterpillar Larva Insect
desc: Represents the early stages of life and growth. Ideal for storytelling, early childhood education, and garden progress.

name: Housefly Common Insect
desc: Symbolizes annoyance or unwanted presence. Great for sanitation tips and realistic nature photography.
